title: Clear Cellophane Wrap Roll – 30M x 40CM Cello Film for Christmas Hampers, Florist Bouquets, Gift Baskets & DIY Wrapping Ideal for Gift Basket Hampers and Gift Wrapping
features: SPECIFICATIONS: Our cellophane roll measures at 16” inches wide and 100’ feet long. This gives you a super long roll to wrap, decorate, and have fun with.

CRYSTAL CLEAR AND DURABLE: This crystal clear cello roll will give your gifts a professional look with a perfect shine. Take any gift or basket and wrap it up with our cello roll, it will look like a masterpiece. At 2.5 mil thick, this cello roll won’t rip or tear as you wrap your gifts. Our cellophane will keep out all dirt and moisture from your treats and gifts.
LIMITLESS USES: Perfect for gift baskets, bouquets of flowers, candies, pastries, cakes, wines, arts and crafts, and so much more. Get creative, and tie with a bow of your choice.

FOOD GRADE SAFE: These cellophane wrap rolls are made from non toxic, eco friendly and odorless material. Since it is 100% Food Grade safe it is great for any cookies, pastries, or treats that you wish to wrap, keeping it fresh and clean!

100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEED: Customer satisfaction is our top priority. We want to make sure that you are completely satisfied with your purchase. If for whatever reason you are not, you can return it through Amazon for a refund. We promote easy and enjoyable shopping experiences!
description: Our Clear Cellophane Wrap Roll (Maouywiee ) Is Perfect For Any Occasion Making Any Gift BEAUTIFUL. Use Clear Wrapping Paper To Wrap Baskets, Boxes, Picture Frames, Large Gifts, Wine Bottles, Flower Arrangements, Fruit Baskets, Wedding Gifts, Cookies, Treats, Candy, Arts Package Includes: 16 inches Cellophane Wrap Roll Size: 16 inches wide cellophane rolled to 100 ft in length Thickness: 2.3 Mil (not like many other that sell lower thickness and tears or break easy) Material: Ultra High Quality BOPP Color: Clear Instructions: As simple as 1,2,3… 1⃣ Unroll to desire Length 2⃣ Cut Cellophane 3⃣ Unfold Cellophane to 16 inches width Give it a try and don’t miss out on these beautiful crystal clear wrap roll that will make your gifts stylish and very convenient! Click The “Add To Cart” Button 🛒 NOW!
